original_hypothesis.title: Reward Solvency Race Condition Due to Unbacked Emissions
original_hypothesis.hypothesis_description: LendingLedger does not verify it holds sufficient CANTO to cover the emissions set by setRewards. If underfunded, claim calls will revert once the balance is depleted, creating a race condition where late claimers lose their earned rewards.
original_hypothesis.investigation_rationale: Highlights a critical trust assumption that governance will perfectly fund the contract; failure leads to direct loss of user yield.
deployment_assumptions: Governance sets emission rates higher than the contract's actual CANTO balance
original_hypothesis.config_evidence: LendingLedger.sol setRewards() does not check address(this).balance.

proof_of_signal.pattern: msg.sender.call{value: uint256(cantoToSend)}("") without global solvency tracking

preconditions: Contract CANTO balance < sum of all pending user rewards

initial_economic_evidence.suspicious_calculation: cantoPerBlock is accumulated infinitely regardless of actual contract balance
initial_economic_evidence.manipulation_vector: Sophisticated actors monitor contract balance and claim immediately before depletion
initial_economic_evidence.profit_hypothesis: First-claimers receive 100% of their yield, late-claimers receive 0% (revert)

economic_questions: Is there any off-chain monitoring to ensure the ledger is always funded?
What happens to the rewardDebt of users whose claims revert?
validation_requirements: Set high rewards, fund partially, have two users claim, verify second reverts

preliminary_attack_economics.potential_profit_range: Preservation of own yield at expense of others

market_conditions_analysis.market_impact_assessment: Loss of trust in protocol reward mechanisms

potential_victim_impact.direct_victims: Less sophisticated or inactive liquidity providers

validation_result.impact_summary: Filtered before validation: attack_realism is LOW
validation_result.detailed_analysis: This hypothesis was auto-rejected because its attack_realism grade is LOW. Preconditions require actions outside the attacker's control (off-chain compromise, victim cooperation, or admin collusion). No LLM validation was performed.
